:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
![Worked-example flow for one placed analytic bend.](figures/one-bend-threading.png){fig-alt="TikZ preview of the one-bend OrbitThreader workflow." width="82%"}
::::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\begin{figure}
\centering
\resizebox{0.78\linewidth}{!}{\input{sections/sandbox/figures/tikz/one-bend-threading.tikz.tex}}
\caption{Worked-example flow for one placed analytic bend.}
\end{figure}
```
::::
